compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure to Implement Backup and Disaster Recovery
compliance_requirements.description: Set up automated backups for your DocumentDB instances to ensure data durability and recoverability. Consider implementing a disaster recovery plan that includes data replication across different availability zones or regions.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure to Implement Backup and Disaster Recovery

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure Encryption in Transit is Enabled
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure Encryption in Transit is Enabled

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure Regular Updates and Patches
compliance_requirements.description: Stay informed about the latest security updates and patches released by Amazon for DocumentDB. Regularly apply updates and patches to your DocumentDB instances to protect against known vulnerabilities.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure Regular Updates and Patches

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure to Implement Access Control and Authentication
compliance_requirements.description: Configure authentication mechanisms for your DocumentDB instances, such as using AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) users or database users. Define appropriate user roles and permissions to control access to the DocumentDB instances and databases.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure to Implement Access Control and Authentication

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure to Implement Monitoring and Alerting
compliance_requirements.description: This helps by alerting the system if any unusual event has occurred or if a particular threshold has been achieved because the user is able to set a desired interval or the cluster. This then allows system administrators to swiftly correct the situation and avoid subsequent complications if something unusual is happening.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure to Implement Monitoring and Alerting

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure VPC Security is Configured
compliance_requirements.description: Creating a VPC, configuring subnets, and creating security groups help isolate your DocumentDB instances within your virtual network and control inbound and outbound traffic.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure VPC Security is Configured

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure to Implement Backup and Disaster Recovery
compliance_requirements.description: Set up automated backups for your DocumentDB instances to ensure data durability and recoverability. Consider implementing a disaster recovery plan that includes data replication across different availability zones or regions.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure to Implement Backup and Disaster Recovery

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure Encryption in Transit is Enabled
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure Encryption in Transit is Enabled

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure Regular Updates and Patches
compliance_requirements.description: Stay informed about the latest security updates and patches released by Amazon for DocumentDB. Regularly apply updates and patches to your DocumentDB instances to protect against known vulnerabilities.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure Regular Updates and Patches

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure to Implement Access Control and Authentication
compliance_requirements.description: Configure authentication mechanisms for your DocumentDB instances, such as using AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) users or database users. Define appropriate user roles and permissions to control access to the DocumentDB instances and databases.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure to Implement Access Control and Authentication

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure to Implement Monitoring and Alerting
compliance_requirements.description: This helps by alerting the system if any unusual event has occurred or if a particular threshold has been achieved because the user is able to set a desired interval or the cluster. This then allows system administrators to swiftly correct the situation and avoid subsequent complications if something unusual is happening.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure to Implement Monitoring and Alerting

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure VPC Security is Configured
compliance_requirements.description: Creating a VPC, configuring subnets, and creating security groups help isolate your DocumentDB instances within your virtual network and control inbound and outbound traffic.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure VPC Security is Configured

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure execution of a Disaster Recovery Failover
compliance_requirements.description: Execute a comprehensive disaster recovery failover to transition operations from the primary system to a backup system during disruptions. This process includes ensuring all critical data and applications are accurately replicated to the backup site for seamless operational continuity. Regularly test and document the failover process to identify and resolve any issues, maintaining readiness to minimize downtime and data loss during real disasters.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure execution of a Disaster Recovery Failover

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure Data at Rest and in Transit is Encrypted
compliance_requirements.description: Once a user is logged in to their AWS account and has access to their Amazon Keyspaces they are encouraged to choose from the following two options to encrypt their data. Depending on which key they select for encryption at rest would store the data according to their preference. For encryption in transit the user is also encouraged to choose from two options depending on if the data needs to be encrypted during transit.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure Data at Rest and in Transit is Encrypted

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure Keyspace Security is Configured
compliance_requirements.description: To access Amazon Keyspaces, the user would be required to log in with their AWS credentials. Once logged in the user can access the AWS resources and can explore the resources that Amazon Keyspaces offers. Amazon Keyspaces offers a lot of security that can mitigate a potential attack.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure Keyspace Security is Configured

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure to Implement Access Control and Authentication
compliance_requirements.description: Utilize QLDB's built-in authentication and access control mechanisms. Define IAM policies to control which users or roles can perform specific actions on QLDB resources. Leverage IAM roles for cross-service access, securely integrating QLDB with other AWS services.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure to Implement Access Control and Authentication

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure to Enable Backup and Recovery
compliance_requirements.description: Having the data backed up ensures that all the crucial information is stored securely it defends against any human errors and system errors that resulted in data loss. An organization that has a disaster recovery plan is prepared for any disruption that would impact business operations.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure to Enable Backup and Recovery

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure Monitoring and Logging is Enabled
compliance_requirements.description: Enable QLDB's built-in logging to capture important system events and database activity. Monitor the logs for any suspicious activities or errors. Leverage Amazon CloudWatch to collect and analyze logs, set up alarms, and receive notifications for potential security incidents.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure Monitoring and Logging is Enabled

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure Network Access is Secure
compliance_requirements.description: By applying certain network access such as Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) it protects the private network that has been established from any external networks from interfering. It allows internal networks to communicate with one another with the network that has been established. The Access Control List (ACLs) allows only specific individuals to access the resources. Also, by monitoring and logging the activity within the database it helps the individual know what is being logged within the activity and determine what next step they should take to address it.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure Network Access is Secure

compliance_requirements.requirement: Ensure AWS Security Hub is enabled
compliance_requirements.description: Security Hub collects security data from various AWS accounts, services, and supported third-party partner products, helping you analyze your security trends and identify the highest-priority security issues. When you enable Security Hub, it begins to consume, aggregate, organize, and prioritize findings from the AWS services that you have enabled, such as Amazon GuardDuty, Amazon Inspector, and Amazon Macie. You can also enable integrations with AWS partner security products.
compliance_requirements.what_is_expected: Ensure compliance with: Ensure AWS Security Hub is enabled

CC7.1 To meet its objectives, the entity uses detection and monitoring procedures to identify (1) changes to configurations that result in the introduction of new vulnerabilities, and (2) susceptibilities to newly discovered vulnerabilities

CC7.2 The entity monitors system components and the operation of those components for anomalies that are indicative of malicious acts, natural disasters, and errors affecting the entity's ability to meet its objectives; anomalies are analyzed to determine whether they represent security events
